Market headwinds are real — 44% breadth in a bearish regime means even good setups get sold. Bull case: sustains above ₹1,147 and pushes towards ₹1,222 as trend followers pile in. Bear case: a slip below ₹1,071 triggers trailing stops and dents the short-term thesis. Needs to resolve ₹1,112–₹1,174 before a directional bet pays. Verdict: HOLD. Own it? Let it work. Don't own it? Cleaner entries exist elsewhere. Outlook: Neutral → Neutral → Neutral.
